title: ba`ath #1204
definition:
1) to terrify, startle, fall upon, dismay, be overtaken by sudden terror
    1a) (Niphal) to be terrified
    1b) (Piel)
        1b1) to fall upon, overwhelm
        1b2) to terrify
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to terrify, startle, fall upon, dismay, be overtaken by sudden terror
    1a) (Niphal) to be terrified
    1b) (Piel)
        1b1) to fall upon, overwhelm
        1b2) to terrify

    NASB:  to fall upon, startle, terrify
